name: NetApp, Inc.
summary: NetApp, Inc. provides enterprise-class software, systems, and services for data infrastructure management. Founded in 1992 and headquartered in San Jose, California, the company offers unified data storage solutions, hybrid and multi-cloud integration, and data management platforms including the ONTAP operating system and BlueXP control plane. NetApp's products support file, block, and object storage across on-premises, private cloud, and public cloud environments including Amazon AWS, Microsoft Azure, and Google Cloud, serving customers across hybrid multi-cloud deployments.
